moments.author: Chris Johnson
moments.quote: Let’s bring back the ALS Ice Bucket Challenge. Grab a bucket, challenge 3 people and if you can, donate to help fund ALS research.
moments.why: A powerful, emotional call to action following his ALS diagnosis, reviving a viral awareness campaign that sparked widespread support.
moments.url: Link to AP News coverage of Johnson’s social post

moments.author: Sophie Cunningham
moments.quote: I’m so glad I got my nails done for this.
moments.why: A self-aware nod to her now-viral 22-second pointing meme, showing how athletes can lean into viral fame.
moments.url: Link to Swipe Sports coverage of her Instagram caption
